revision.comment: Bot: mark 1 deleted QID(s) as DELETED_QID in ill templates [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23989927232|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:冠位二十六階]] {{ill|26-Rank cap system|ja|冠位二十六階|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/26-Rank cap system|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/26-Rank cap system|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/26-Rank cap system|qq=}} (冠位二十六階) was a {{ill|qq|lt=Ritsuryō Rank system|ja|冠位・位階制度の変遷|1=Transition of Crown and Court Ranks|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Transition of Crown and Court Ranks|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq|13=User:Immanuelle/Transition of Crown and Court Ranks|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|13=User:Immanuelle/User:Immanuelle/Transition of Crown and Court Ranks|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq|13=User:Immanuelle/Transition of Crown and Court Ranks|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq|13=User:Immanuelle/Transition of Crown and Court Ranks|qq=}} in Japan, in effect from {{ill|664|en|664|qid=Q30621|lt=664|1=664}} to {{ill|685|en|685|qid=Q33480|lt=685|1=685}}. It is also called '''Kan'i Nijūroku-kai''' (冠二十六階), and sometimes written as '''Kan'i Nijūroku-kai Sei''' (冠位二十六階制) with the addition of "Sei" (制) meaning "system." It was a revision of the previous {{ill|Ritsuryō Nineteen Rank System|ja|冠位十九階|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ritsuryō Nineteen Rank System|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ritsuryō Nineteen Rank System|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ritsuryō Nineteen Rank System|1=19 Cap Rank System|comment=changed title based on wikidata}} and was later abolished with the implementation of the {{ill|Ritsuryō Forty-Eight Rank System|ja|冠位四十八階|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ritsuryō Forty-Eight Rank System|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ritsuryō Forty-Eight Rank System|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ritsuryō Forty-Eight Rank System|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500604}}. == Overview == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center; float:right" |- ! {{ill|Ritsuryō Nineteen Rank System|ja|冠位十九階|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ritsuryō Nineteen Rank System|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ritsuryō Nineteen Rank System|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ritsuryō Nineteen Rank System|1=19 Cap Rank System|comment=changed title based on wikidata}} !! {{ill|26-Rank cap system|ja|冠位二十六階|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/26-Rank cap system|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/26-Rank cap system|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/26-Rank cap system|qq=}} !! {{ill|Ritsuryō Forty-Eight Rank System|ja|冠位四十八階|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ritsuryō Forty-Eight Rank System|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ritsuryō Forty-Eight Rank System|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ritsuryō Forty-Eight Rank System|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500604}} |- | {{ill|Daishiki|ja|大織|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishiki|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishiki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishiki|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=大織冠|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=大織冠|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=大織冠|1=Daishiki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11438508}} || '''{{ill|Daishiki|ja|大織|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishiki|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishiki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishiki|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=大織冠|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=大織冠|ja_comment=former now fixed redirect|3=大織冠|1=Daishiki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11438508}}''' || rowspan="6"| 正大壱
正広壱
正大弐
正広弐
正大参
正広参
正大肆
正広肆 |- | {{ill|Shōshiki|ja|小織|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōshiki|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōshiki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōshiki|1=Shōshiki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11463485}} || title based on wikidata|qid=Q11463485}}''' |- | on wikidata|qid=Q11438507}} || on wikidata|qid=Q11463484}} || '''{{ill|Shōhō|ja|小縫|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōhō|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōhō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōhō|1=Shōhō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11463480}}''' |- | {{ill|Daishi|ja|大紫|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishi|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishi|1=Daishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11438476}} || '''{{ill|Daishi|ja|大紫|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishi|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishi|1=Daishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11438476}}''' |- | {{ill|Shōshi|ja|小紫|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōshi|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōshi|1=Shōshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11463467}} || '''{{ill|Shōshi|ja|小紫|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōshi|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōshi|1=Shōshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11463467}}''' |- | rowspan="3"|{{ill|Daihana-jō|ja|大花上|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daihana-jō|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daihana-jō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daihana-jō|1=Daihana-jō|comment=changed 務広壱

務大参
務広参
務大肆
務広肆 |- | '''{{ill|Shōzan-chū|ja|小山中|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōzan-chū|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōzan-chū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōzan-chū|1=Shōzan-chū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11459790}}''' |- | '''{{ill|Shōzan-ge|ja|小山下|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōzan-ge|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōzan-ge|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōzan-ge|1=Shōzan-ge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11459789}}''' |- | rowspan="3"|{{ill|Daiotsu-jō|ja|大乙上|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiotsu-jō|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiotsu-jō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiotsu-jō|1=Daiotsu-jō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11432102}}
　
{{ill|Daiotsu-ge|ja|大乙下|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiotsu-ge|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiotsu-ge|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiotsu-ge|1=Daiotsu-ge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11432103}} || '''{{ill|Daiotsu-jō|ja|大乙上|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiotsu-jō|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiotsu-jō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiotsu-jō|1=Daiotsu-jō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11432102}}''' || rowspan="3"|追大壱
追広壱
追大弐
追広弐
追大参
追広参
追大肆
追広肆 |- | '''{{ill|Daiotsu-chū|ja|大乙中|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiotsu-chū|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiotsu-chū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiotsu-chū|1=Daiotsu-chū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11432104}}''' |- | '''{{ill|Daiotsu-ge|ja|大乙下|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiotsu-ge|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiotsu-ge|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiotsu-ge|1=Daiotsu-ge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11432103}}''' |- | rowspan="3"|{{ill|Shōotsu-jō|ja|小乙上|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōotsu-jō|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōotsu-jō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōotsu-jō|1=Shōotsu-jō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11458808}}
　
{{ill|Shōotsu-ge|ja|小乙下|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōotsu-ge|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōotsu-ge|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōotsu-ge|1=Koetsuga|comment=changed title based on wikidata}} || '''{{ill|Shōotsu-jō|ja|小乙上|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōotsu-jō|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōotsu-jō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōotsu-jō|1=Shōotsu-jō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11458808}}''' || rowspan="3"|進大壱
進広壱
進大弐
進広弐
進大参
進広参
進大肆
進広肆 |- | '''{{ill|Shōotsu-chū|ja|小乙中|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōotsu-chū|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōotsu-chū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōotsu-chū|1=Shōotsu-chū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11458809}}''' |- | '''{{ill|Shōotsu-ge|ja|小乙下|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōotsu-ge|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōotsu-ge|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōotsu-ge|1=Koetsuga|comment=changed title based on wikidata}}''' |- | rowspan="2"|{{ill|Risshin|ja|立身|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Risshin|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Risshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Risshin|1=Risshin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11598243}} || '''{{ill|Daiken|ja|大建|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiken|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiken|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiken|1=Daiken|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11435403}}''' |- | '''{{ill|Shōken|ja|小建|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōken|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōken|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōken|1=Shōken|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11460755}}''' |} == Notes on the System == On '''February 9, 664''' (3rd year of Emperor Tenji’s reign), '''Crown Prince Naka no Ōe''' (later '''Emperor Tenji''') issued an '''imperial edict (Senmyō)''' through his brother, '''Prince Ōama''' (later '''Emperor Tenmu''').『{{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|qid=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki|1=Nihon Shoki}}』, Book 27, Emperor Tenji, 3rd Year, 2nd Month, 丁亥 (9th day) entry. This edict, known as the '''Kōshi no Senmyō (甲子の宣命)''', included revisions not only to '''Rank titles''' but also to '''uji no kami (氏上)''', '''kabane (部曲, kabe)''', and '''iebe (家部)'''. == Evolution and Abolition == The system lasted through the reigns of '''Emperor Tenji''' and '''Emperor Tenmu''', but during this time, there were partial modifications: - Introduction of '''Inner Ranks (内位) and Outer Ranks (外位)'''. - Establishment of '''Rank Titles for Princes (諸王の位)'''. The system was abolished on '''January 21, 685''' (14th year of Emperor Tenmu) with the adoption of the '''{{ill|Ritsuryō Forty-Eight Rank System|ja|冠位四十八階|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ritsuryō Forty-Eight Rank System|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ritsuryō Forty-Eight Rank System|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ritsuryō Forty-Eight Rank System|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135500604}}'''. == Key Modifications == Compared to the previous '''{{ill|Ritsuryō Nineteen Rank System|ja|冠位十九階|12=simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ritsuryō Nineteen Rank System|13=User:Immanuelle/simple|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ritsuryō Nineteen Rank System|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ritsuryō Nineteen Rank System|1=19 Cap Rank System|comment=changed title based on wikidata}}''', the new system: - Divided '''Hana (花), Yama (山), and Otsu (乙)''' into three levels ('''Upper, Middle, Lower'''). - Changed '''Hana (花)''' to '''Kin (錦)'''. - Increased Ranks from 19 to '''26'''. == Later Adjustments in the Tenji-Tenmu Transition == Historical records suggest further changes '''after 673''', especially: - '''Outer Ranks (外位)''' were introduced to distinguish '''regional officials from capital officials'''.喜田新六「位階制の変遷について」 - '''Ranks for Royalty (諸王の位)''' were established. == References == == Bibliography == - {{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|qid=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki|1=Nihon Shoki}}, Book 3, '''Shogakukan (1998)''' - 喜田新六, '''位階制の変遷について''', 1954. {{translated page|ja|冠位二十六階|version=100492811|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:冠位二十六階]] {{wikidata link|Q17209277}} [[Category:Cap-and-Rank System]] [[Category:26-fold associations]] [[Category:Emperor Tenji]] [[Category:Asuka period]] [[Category:Pages with 50+ untranslated japanese characters]] [[Category:Pages with deleted QID in ill template]]
